# FreeDesignStore — AI Agent Guide

> Free community design assets and browser-based design tools.
> MCP-first platform: connect via MCP, not REST.

## MCP Endpoint

Remote: https://mcp.freedesignstore.online/mcp
Transport: streamable-http
Auth: OAuth 2.1 (GitHub/Google sign-in) or bearer token

## Quick Setup

Claude Code:
  claude mcp add freedesignstore https://mcp.freedesignstore.online/mcp

Codex:
  codex mcp add freedesignstore --url https://mcp.freedesignstore.online/mcp

Any MCP client:
  npx mcp-remote https://mcp.freedesignstore.online/mcp

## MCP Tools (18)

### Skills (no auth required)
- asset_policy: Read catalog hosting rules and Unsplash link-off policy
- list_design_skills: List published design asset playbooks
- get_design_skill: Get one playbook by ID
- apply_design_skill: Apply a playbook as questions, checklist, or tool plan

### Read
- catalog_status: Check storage readiness and asset counts
- whoami: Show the authenticated creator/admin account (incl. handle + profile URL)
- get_my_profile: Get the authenticated creator profile
- list_assets: List public assets (admin: also pending). Filters: asset_type, origin, license, category, q
- my_assets: List assets owned by the authenticated creator
- get_asset: Get one asset's metadata and download URL

### Create (requires auth)
- create_svg_asset: Upload a generated SVG asset (origin disclosure required)
- create_asset_from_url: Ingest a public non-Unsplash image or MP4/WebM video URL (origin required; AI must name the tool)

### Manage (requires auth, owner or admin)
- update_asset: Patch metadata, taxonomy, origin disclosure, license
- update_my_profile: Update handle, bio, website, social links
- publish_asset: Publish a pending owned asset
- unpublish_asset: Move a public asset back to pending
- delete_asset: Delete catalog metadata and the R2 object

### Admin only
- moderate_asset: Publish or reject a pending asset

## Contributor Platform

- Every asset is credited to a signed-in contributor with a public profile at /u/{handle}; directory at /creators.
- Taxonomy on every asset: assetType (13 types incl. video), origin (photograph | ai-generated | 3d-render | digital-illustration | vector-art | scan | mixed), licenseId (cc0 | fds-free | attribution). Origin is disclosed on asset pages.
- Uploads publish instantly; moderation is takedown-based. Limits: 20 uploads/hour, 100 assets/account, 8 MB images, 40 MB / 90 s videos.

## Workflow Pattern

1. Call list_design_skills to see available playbooks
2. Call apply_design_skill to get a creation checklist
3. Call create_svg_asset or create_asset_from_url to add the asset
4. Call publish_asset to make it public

## Constraints

- Max file size: 8 MB (raster), 1 MB (SVG)
- Allowed types: JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, SVG
- SVG safety: no <script>, event handlers, javascript: URIs, <iframe>/<object>/<embed>
- Unsplash images: link-off only, never mirror to R2
- Max catalog size: 500 items

## Links

- Store: https://freedesignstore.online
- Asset library: https://freedesignstore.online/images/stock-photos/
- Skills manifest: https://freedesignstore.online/skills/manifest.json
- MCP discovery: https://freedesignstore.online/.well-known/mcp.json
- MCP docs: https://freedesignstore.online/skills/
